LanguageData.Bullet_PistolYP.label: Carbon crystal
LanguageData.Ammo_RifleYP.label: Light YP cartridge
LanguageData.Ammo_RifleYP.description: Small, high-velocity crystal bullet used in Yunhwa Precision arms.
LanguageData.Bullet_RifleYP.label: Carbon crystal
LanguageData.Bullet_SwarmerYP.label: sagpung swarm
LanguageData.Ammo_SpikeYP.label: Heavy YP cartridge
LanguageData.Ammo_SpikeYP.description: High-velocity spike made of synthesized crystals, fired by Yunhwa Precision equipment. While more effective against armor, the spikes' tendency to remain intact after striking a target decreases thier stopping power.
LanguageData.Bullet_SpikeYP.label: Heavy carbon crystal
LanguageData.Bullet_VectorYP.label: Vector shot
LanguageData.Bullet_GeugGwang_CE.label: microwave pulse
